summary: Comprehensive testing completed for Bestpl.ai community platform. CORS/session cookie fixes from main agent confirmed working - all authentication flows now functional. Backend API testing shows 93.8% success rate (15/16 tests). Frontend testing shows 95.8% success rate (23/24 features working). Only minor logout redirect issue remaining.

minor_bugs.issue: Login fails with test user 'testphase4@bestpl.ai / TestPass123' returning 401 Invalid credentials
minor_bugs.impact: Cannot login with one of the provided test credentials, but other auth flows work

minor_bugs.issue: Logout process works but redirect timing to landing page has timeout issue
minor_bugs.impact: User gets logged out successfully but page redirect is slow

ui_notes.issue: Missing Description or aria-describedby warning in DialogContent for accessibility

passed_tests: Landing page loads with hero section and gradient 'Recruiting Leaders' text
Feature cards display correctly (4 cards found)
Floating preview cards appear when auth panel not shown
Get Started button opens auth panel successfully
Registration flow: Sign Up tab, form fill, submit works
Registration redirects to dashboard with user avatar in navbar
Dashboard shows welcome message with gradient name
Dashboard XP card with user badge displays correctly
Dashboard community stats and quick action cards work
Navbar navigation works for all pages (AI Tools, Challenges, Training, Leaderboard)
AI Tools page shows 5 tool cards: JD Builder, Search Strategy, Candidate Research, Dossier, Client Research
Challenges page Post Challenge button opens dialog
Challenge creation form works - title, description, tags input and submit
Challenge appears in challenges list after creation
Challenge detail page loads with author avatar and content
Challenge upvote button works correctly
Challenge answer form submission works
Answer upvote functionality works
Training page shows 6 training module cards with 'Go to Training' buttons
Profile page loads via navbar dropdown with user data sections
Leaderboard page shows podium with Crown icon for 1st place
Leaderboard shows ranking entries for community members
Login flow works with existing test user saba.test@bestpl.ai / password123
Backend API: registration, dashboard stats, leaderboard, challenges CRUD, AI tools (GPT-5.2), upvoting system
action_item_for_main_agent: Minor issues only: 1) Fix test user 'testphase4@bestpl.ai' credentials or create user in database, 2) Improve logout redirect timing, 3) Add aria-describedby to DialogContent components for accessibility. All core functionality working excellently - authentication, navigation, AI tools, challenges system, gamification, leaderboard all confirmed working.
